case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SHALIN KADAKIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200001195) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-02-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 65615420)
